title: Got incorrect warning message in latest releases version 4.202

features.name: indexed part select LHS in for-loop inside case item
features.description: Code should include an indexed part select assignment on the left-hand side of a procedural assignment, where the select width and offset are computed using loop variables inside a for-loop that is a case item statement

features.name: always_comb with case statement having literal case items
features.description: Code should include an always @(*) block containing a case statement with literal (non-default) case items where all branches assign to the same signal

features.name: replication operator in procedural assignment RHS
features.description: Code should include the replication operator {N{expr}} on the right-hand side of a procedural assignment inside a for-loop
